intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is represented only by the white rabbit anchor; the plant itself is absent.

plant_audit.P1: Pot is empty; soil surface appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2: No vegetation detected; pot appears to contain only substrate.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit anchor present; no Pothos foliage detected.
plant_audit.P4: No vegetation detected; integrated with P2 pot space.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely crushed eggshells) present in the foreground pot.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant biological growth or fungal spread observed.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-5: Initial state shows bare pots with minimal debris.
temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-1: Introduction of a white cylindrical object (likely a supplement or tool) near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: The cylindrical object remains; no vegetative growth or recovery observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: All specimens are currently in a state of total systemic loss. There is no evidence of active photosynthesis or viable plant tissue in any of the registered pots.
anomalies: Presence of crushed eggshells in foreground pot
Complete absence of expected botanical specimens
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently non-functional. The registry indicates four distinct plants, but the visual evidence confirms that all pots are devoid of living plant matter. The white rabbit anchor in P3 is the only non-substrate object remaining from the original inventory. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed propagation setup.
